name: Dashboard
description: Access the platform admin home dashboard and high-level overview widgets.

name: Organizer Dashboard
description: Access the merchant partner portal dashboard with stats and activity summaries.

name: Analytics
description: View platform-wide analytics charts and export reports for all organizations.

name: Organizer Analytics
description: View analytics and performance charts scoped to the merchant partner organization.

name: Organizer Accounting
description: Finance Module: View remittance, payouts, and accounting summaries; submit payout requests.

name: Finance
description: Access the platform finance console for profit and loss and operator remittance tools.

name: User
description: Manage end-customer accounts: list, create, update, delete, and export customer records.

name: Admin Users
description: Manage platform and merchant partner staff accounts, including roles and organization assignment.

name: Roles
description: Create and configure roles plus assign module permissions for admin and merchant partner users.

name: Permissions
description: View the catalog of permission modules (editing is controlled via roles).

name: Tickets
description: Issue, update, void, export, and import individual issued tickets and attendee records.

name: Events
description: Manage ticketed events: create, edit, publish, cancel, export, and import event listings.

name: Fun
description: Manage Fun experiences: create, edit, publish, cancel, export, and import Fun listings.

name: Event Section
description: Configure event page sections and content blocks shown on public event pages.

name: Event Tickets
description: Manage ticket types, pricing tiers, and inventory tied to an event.

name: Event Scanner
description: Use QR or barcode scanning tools to validate tickets at the venue entrance.

name: Schedules
description: Create and maintain event schedules and recurring or multi-day run dates.

name: Schedule Times
description: Define individual time slots or sessions within an event schedule.

name: Transactions
description: View and manage payment transactions, including refunds and transaction exports where enabled.

name: Organizations
description: Manage merchant partner and affiliate organizations, profiles, and related settings.

name: Organizers
description: Dashboard Stats Recent Activities and Upcoming Event.

name: Payments
description: Configure payment gateways

name: Commissions
description: View and set platform commission rates for merchant partners including change history.

name: Payment Methods
description: Enable or disable checkout payment methods for individual merchant partners.

name: Activity Compliance
description: View and manage per-event taxes and fees (VAT, city tax, service charge) for merchant partners.

name: Markup
description: View merchant ticket base pricing and set platform markup per ticket type (hidden from customers and merchants).

name: Affiliate Partners
description: View affiliate partner enrollments and suspend or reinstate partner access.

name: Affiliate Events
description: View ticket events and configure per-event affiliate commission settings.

name: Affiliate Fun
description: View Fun listings and configure per-listing affiliate commission settings.

name: Affiliate Payouts
description: Review affiliate payout requests and approve or decline withdrawals.

name: Promo Codes
description: Create and manage promotional discount codes applied during checkout.

name: Upload
description: Upload images and files used across events

name: Categories
description: Organize events and Fun items with categories used in filters and admin forms.

name: Venues
description: Manage venues, seating layouts, and location details for in-person events.

name: Venue Listing
description: Manage marketplace venue listings: create, update, publish, delete, and export rental spaces.

name: Reports
description: View and export platform-level operational and sales reports.

name: Settings
description: Configure global platform settings such as fees

name: CMS
description: Manage marketplace information pages and editable footer content.

name: Notifications
description: Manage system and email notification templates and delivery settings.

name: Profile
description: View and update the signed-in user profile and organization profile details.
